item.body:
## What's Changed
### Import / Export - **Export** — Projects with more than one HMI export every HMI. - **Import** — Importing HMI items applies to the HMI you selected. - **Export** — Drag HMI screens, tag tables, and scripts from the project tree onto the export or compare panel.
### Find Unused - **Find Unused** — Deleting unused items shows TIA Portal as in use for the whole operation, whether you delete a single item or a full category.
### Editor - **SCL editor** — Flags a missing semicolon, an assignment with no value, and an operator with no operand. - **Editor** — Double-clicking an HMI tag table opens it in the editor.
